title: Procedure and Formalization
prompt: Explain what is gained and lost when a task is turned into a formal procedure.

title: Representation and Reality
prompt: Distinguish algorithmic representations from the world they represent.

title: Delegation and Agency
prompt: Identify what authority has been delegated to an algorithmic system.

title: Explanation and Contestability
prompt: Design explanation and appeal pathways for affected people.

title: AI Governance
prompt: Explain why AI outputs require review, sourcing, testing, and institutional responsibility.
